## SigMap commands

| When | Command |
|------|---------|
| Before answering a question about code | `sigmap ask "<your question>"` |
| After changing config or source dirs | `sigmap validate` |
| To verify an AI answer is grounded | `sigmap judge --response <file>` |

export class BM25Scorer
  constructor(options = {})
  indexDocuments(documents)
  for(const doc of documents)
  if(this.fieldBoosting)
  if(doc.title)
  for(let i = 0; i < 4; i++)
  for(let i = 0; i < 4; i++)

## utils

### utils\storage-manager.js
```
class StorageManager
  constructor(options = {})
  if(!this.storage)
  if(!this.autoSerialize)
  if(!this.autoSerialize)
  set(key, value, options = {}) → boolean
  if(options.ttl)
  if(this._isMemoryMode)
  get(key, defaultValue = null) → *
function createStorage(options = {}) → boolean
function createSessionStorage(options = {}) → StorageManager
```

### utils\data-structures.js
```
class LRUCache
  constructor(capacity)
  get(key) → *
  set(key, value) → BiMap
  if(this.cache.size > this.capacity)
  has(key) → boolean
  delete(key) → boolean
  clear()
  size() → number
class Queue
  constructor()
  enqueue(item) → PriorityQueue
  enqueueMany(items) → Queue
  dequeue() → *
  peek() → *
  isEmpty() → boolean
  size() → number
  clear()
class PriorityQueue
  enqueue(item) → PriorityQueue
  dequeue() → *
  peek() → *
  isEmpty() → boolean
  size() → number
  clear()
```
